name: Terry Sullivan, MarcoRubio.com
subject: 5 things
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41729854:16711544529:m:1:1349778030:C1277B80E7FEC396206F3EF349087E66:r)
---
Peter, Since yesterday, over 5,170 people have [_**changed their social media profile pictures to show their support for Marco.**__****_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41729855:16711544529:m:1:1349778030:C1277B80E7FEC396206F3EF349087E66:r) If you haven't changed your Facebook or Twitter profile images yet, here are 5 reasons you should do it right now: | 1\. It's a great way to start a conversation with your friends, family, co-workers, neighbors, and classmates about Marco and our campaign. 2\. Your endorsement means a lot to your social network. **3\. It 's free!** 4\. The average American spends 40 minutes a day on Facebook and the average Facebook user has 338 friends. That adds up to a lot of opportunities for someone to see your profile image & search for more information. 5\. Did I mention it's**free?**
---
[**_So click here, pick an image, and update your profile now._**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41729855:16711544529:m:1:1349778030:C1277B80E7FEC396206F3EF349087E66:r)**[__](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41729855:16711544529:m:1:1349778030:C1277B80E7FEC396206F3EF349087E66:r)**
Even if it's just for a couple of days, it can make a big impact at this early stage.
Thanks for your help!
Terry Sullivan
Campaign Manager
Marco Rubio for President
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41729856:16711544529:m:1:1349778030:C1277B80E7FEC396206F3EF349087E66:r)

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: SIGN to end Citizens United
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| I'm disgusted by what the disastrous Citizens United Supreme Court decision has done to our Democracy.Friend -- In 2012, I defeated Allen West by 0.6% in the MOST expensive U.S. House race in history. I've seen firsthand how dark money in politics has made extreme Tea Party candidates competitive in places where they shouldn't be. And I've seen too many extreme Republicans come to Congress. The bottom line is that I'm disgusted by what the disastrous _Citizens United_ Supreme Court decision has done to our democracy. **Now that Hillary Clinton has brought the fight to overturn _Citizens United_ to the national stage, we must stand with her.** | _**"We need to fix our dysfunctional political system, and get unaccountable money out of it once and for all -- even if it takes a constitutional amendment."**_
-Hillary Clinton, 4/14/2015 | **[SIGN IF YOU AGREE »](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae27c6/738133e4/398566d7/7f9b8175/1047878672/VEsH/ "http://sign.citizens-against-citizens-united.com/#murphy")**
---
Hillary is right. We must do whatever it takes to get unaccountable money out of politics -- even if it takes a constitutional amendment.
**[If you're "all in" to end _Citizens United_ , click here to join Hillary and me in calling for a constitutional amendment today.](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae27c6/738133e4/398566d7/7f9b8175/1047878672/VEsE/ "http://sign.citizens-against-citizens-united.com/#murphy")**
Thanks,
Patrick Murphy
**[Contribute »](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-april2015?refcode=ema_2015-04-24_b1_pm&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
---
